name: HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS
description: This table stores the evaluation sections

columns.Name: EVAL_SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key to Sections

columns.Name: ENABLE_SECTION_COMMENTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: ENABLE_SECTION_COMMENTS_FLAG

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: TMPL_SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRA_TMPL_SECTIONS

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_B

columns.Name: EVALUATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRA_EVALUATIONS

columns.Name: SEQUENCE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Indicates the sequence of the section to be displayed in the performance document

columns.Name: SECTION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the type of the section

columns.Name: RATE_SECTION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to allow the user to enter a rating for the section, or for the system to calculate a rating for the section.

columns.Name: CALCULATION_RULE_CODE
columns.Comments: The calculation method for the section.  This value comes from the section configuration at the performance template.

columns.Name: FAST_FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the fast formula that the system should use when the section is to be rated by means of calculation using a fast formula.

columns.Name: SECTION_RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: The rating model for the section.  (Note this may or may not be the same as the rating model for individual items.)

columns.Name: WEIGHT_SECTION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the section can be weighted or not

columns.Name: SECTION_WEIGHT
columns.Comments: The weight of this section, in relation to other sections in the performance document.  This value comes from the section configuration at the performance template and may be editable, depending on configuration

columns.Name: SECTION_MIN_WEIGHT
columns.Comments: The minimum weight for this section.  This value comes from the section configuration at the performance template

columns.Name: ENABLE_ITEMS
columns.Comments: Indicates that the section will contain items such as specific competencies or goals.

columns.Name: FREE_FORM_ALLOWED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the system will allow the user to add free-from items.

columns.Name: RATE_ITEM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the user can rate each item within the section.

columns.Name: RATING_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: This field allows the user to choose the rating type they would like to apply to items in this section.

columns.Name: USE_SECRTG_FOR_PERFRTG_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will use the rating model specified for section, for all items within this section.

columns.Name: PERF_RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the rating model for performance ratings, if the section rating model is not being used.

columns.Name: ITEM_CALCULATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the calculation code for the items within the section

columns.Name: SHOW_TARGET_PERF_RTG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will display the target performance rating field in the performance document

columns.Name: SHOW_TARGET_PROF_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will display the target proficiency level  field in the performance document

columns.Name: ADD_ITEMS_CONFIRM_CRIT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the system will allow users to add items to the section.

columns.Name: SECTION_WEIGHT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the section should be weighted

columns.Name: SECTION_MIN_WEIGHT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the section should have any minimum weight. This applies only when section can be weighted.

columns.Name: SHOW_MANDATORY
columns.Comments: Indicates if the user can edit or delete items at the performance document.  This setting would typically be used in conjunction with integration with profile content.

columns.Name: SHOW_CRITICAL
columns.Comments: Allows the user to indicate if a content item is critical, at the performance document.

columns.Name: SHOW_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Indicates if the system will display the description of the content item from the content library, at the performance document.

columns.Name: SHOW_MEASUREMENT
columns.Comments: Indicates if the system will display a Measurement field at the performance template. This setting is used with free-form items to describe the standard against which performance is measured.

columns.Name: SHOW_DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates if the system will display a due date field at the performance document, one date per item.

columns.Name: SHOW_REMINDER_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates if the system will display a reminder date field at the performance document, one date per item.

columns.Name: SHOW_OWNED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates if the system will display an owner field at the performance document.

columns.Name: SHOW_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates if the system will display a status field, at the performance document, for each item.

columns.Name: SHOW_PERCENT_COMPLETE
columns.Comments: Indicates if the system will display a percent complete field, at the performance document, for each item.

columns.Name: PROFILE_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the type of profile to be used for this section. Foreign key to HRT_PROFILE_TYPES_B

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: This field is the profile ID of a specific model profile, used for copying content when generating performance documents.

columns.Name: RATING_OVERIDE_FLAG
columns.Comments: This indicates if the rating has been overridden by the user

columns.Name: USE_PROFILE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if we have to use profile for populating section items

columns.Name: USE_SPEC_PROFILE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if we can use specific profile for populating section items

columns.Name: USE_SPEC_CONTENT_ITEM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if we can specific content items

columns.Name: USE_WORKER_GOALS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the section should use worker goals from Goal Management. This applies to only Goal type sections.

columns.Name: UPDATE_GOAL_WEIGHTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to update weights of the existing goals in PD from Goal Management

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: These are the comments entered for this section. Typically this column is used for manager feedback and worker feedback sections.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: USE_WRITING_ASSISTANT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will use writing assistant flag at the performance template

columns.Name: COMMENT_TEXT
columns.Comments: These are the comments entered for this section. Typically this column is used for manager feedback and worker feedback sections.

columns.Name: ROUNDING_RULE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the rounding rule that will be used for ratings that are calculated by the system. Valid values are Standard, Up and Down.

columns.Name: DECIMAL_PLACES
columns.Comments: Indicates the number of decimal places for calculated ratings.

columns.Name: MAPPING_METHOD_CODE
columns.Comments: Method to determine the rating when there is no exact match between the calculated rating and a rating level from the rating model used in the section. Valid values are Nearest, Lowest, and Highest.

columns.Name: CALC_MAPPING_CODE
columns.Comments: With mapping method code, this field indicates how the calculated numeric score should be mapped to a rating level in the rating model. Valid values are Numeric Rating and Points Range.

columns.Name: USE_SEC_WEIGHTS_FOR_CALC
columns.Comments: Indicates section weight to be part of calcuation for the ratings of overall summary section.

columns.Name: ENABLE_CHILD_ITEMS_FLAG
columns.Comments: It indicates whether Behaviors defined as child items for Competencies in Profile Management are displayed in the Competency section.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_FUTURE_ITEMS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates about future development goals starting after performance document evaluation period

columns.Name: EXCLUDE_INACTIVE_ITEMS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to exclude development goals whose status is inactive.

columns.Name: REFERENCE_SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the reference to the current section in Profile Management.

columns.Name: ENABLE_ITEM_COMMENTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether item comments is enabled for the section.

columns.Name: EVALUATION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Goal evaluation type is used to determine how that goal plan should be evaluated in a performance document.

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to the HRG_GOAL_PLN_ASSIGNMENTS

columns.Name: INCLUDE_QSTNR_SCORING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Store whether to enable scoring for the questionnaire section.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_QSTNR_SCORE_OS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Store whether to include questionnaire score in overall summary ratings calculation.
